meaning: adj.平坦的,扁平的,单调的,倒下的,浅的,干脆的,无聊的,无力的adv.平直地,仰卧地,恰恰,正好,断然地n.平面,平地,一层,公寓v.(使)变平,(使)降半音
examples: The cloth should be laid flat.
Her voice was flat and expressionless.
The countryside is flat and featureless.
Police later raided the flat just before Nesbitt and his partner were going to bed.
The Proficient MaxTV is uniquely designed to bring high fidelity audio performance to flat panel TVs.
